en: Today it's my turn. Storage room.
notes: 开场 · 进入 3F 储藏室

en: Mar 4 - They called me to the hall again.|Apr X - All my fault.
notes: 日记本 · 2 页用 | 分隔

en: Before the broadcast, a sound plays. Hide in the cabinet when you hear it. Don't let it see you move.
A locker key. The tag says: 2F locker row.
An old school uniform folded neatly. A pair of glasses in the pocket. And an opened letter.
[Red / Green lens - press Q to cycle] Wearing removes that color's veil. Watch: same-color warnings vanish too.
notes: 5 秒自动关,首次装备眼镜

zh_green: 我一直注意到你了,你那么努力却没有人看见你。我想见你一次——放学后来402,我会等你。我喜欢你,也心疼你。                                         ——[校草姓名]
en_green: I've always noticed you, how hard you try when no one sees it. Come to 402 after school - I'll wait for you. I love you, and I ache for you.   — [Popular boy]
notes: 情书 · 绿镜显完整版

en: The door is here - locked. Padlock. Someone locked it on purpose. The key must still be in the building.
[Something hides under the red veil - look carefully.]
She actually thinks the popular boy likes her lol - let's all go to 402 after school and watch!
He said it's just a prank - how is she so gullible, she deserves it.
Someone likes her? Yeah right. Lure her up, lock the door, watch her squirm lol
Spare key in 301 - there's a hidden slot in the podium drawer. Teachers don't know. Put it back after use, leave no trace.
A hidden compartment behind the drawer side - there's a key inside.
This is the 4F key. If it's here, someone knew it was here.
[With red lens, the stairs door is visible. Key in hand - you can open it.]
notes: 需持钥匙 + 红镜 + 到楼梯口

en: So scared... Dad... where are you...
A voice recorder - red light on, looping. This is the broadcast source. (F to stop)
The broadcast stopped. Footsteps in the hall stopped too. ...Only wind outside.
notes: 按 F 关录音笔后

en: [Put on green lens. Try F again.]
notes: 录音笔停止 + 切绿镜

en: Student [Girl name], please come to 4F Room 402, (Recording cuts to static.)
He is her father. Three years in this building, never knowing why she fell from the 4th floor that day. Now he knows.
notes: T-21 结束后 · 保安 → Stopped

en: [Green lens. The floor will tell you where to go.]
(She pushes open the side door and walks out. The real world - cars flowing.)

zh: 旧校服口袋里的眼镜。镜片可以在红 / 绿两种颜色之间切换。戴上某色会让那种颜色的遮层消失。
en: An old pair of glasses from a uniform pocket. Lens cycles between red and green. Wearing removes that color's veil.

zh: 扣子上写着二楼储物柜编号。
藏在 301 讲台暗格里的备用钥匙。
en: A spare key hidden in the 301 podium drawer.

zh: 两页日记。笔迹越写越潦草。
en: Two pages. The handwriting grows rougher each entry.

zh: 讲台上的录音笔。红灯闪烁,似乎在循环播放什么。
en: A voice recorder on the podium. Red light blinking. Seems to loop something.

zh: 一封被仔细折叠的信,信封已经拆过。大部分字迹被某种颜色盖住,只有戴对滤镜才能看清。
en: A carefully folded letter in an already-opened envelope. Most of the text is covered in color - only the right lens reveals it.

zh: 你看穿了棱镜禁区的秘密。
en: You saw through the Prism Zone.

zh: 门被锁住了 — 需要钥匙
en: The door is locked - you need a key.

zh: 你出来了。三棱镜看见了一切。
en: You made it out. The prism saw everything.
